creator: wblock@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the link on the main freebsd.org page under "SHORTCUTS".

Yes, it is still misleading.  A shortcut called "Report a bug" implies that FreeBSD is so buggy that one of the main things visitors to the site need is an easy way to report those bugs.  The intent is, I believe, more to let visitors search for bugs.

The page the link goes to is titled "Bug Reports".  Either that, or the "Bug Database" in the patch is more accurate and less misleading.
